train_3968.llm_answer: Consumer advocate: there is no doubt that the government is responsible for the increased cost of gasoline, because the government's policies have significantly increased consumer demand for fuel, and as a result, the price of gasoline has risen steadily due to various market factors.

train_316.llm_answer: Statement1: To suit the needs of corporate clients, advertising agencies have successfully modified a strategy originally developed for political campaigns. train_4399.llm_answer: Consumer magazine: because front-loading washers use less water than top-loading washers, they do not get clothes as clean as top-loading washers. train_2130.llm_answer: The dean of computing must be respected by the academic staff and be competent to oversee the use of computers on campus. Furthermore, the board of trustees has decided that the dean of computing must be selected from among this university's staff. Therefore, the dean of computing must be a professor from this university's computer science department.
train_2130.llm_explanation: The modification ensures that Premise 2 ("At this university, every professor who holds a doctoral degree in computer science really knows about computers.") becomes a necessary assumption for the argument, as respect and competence are directly linked to possessing a doctoral degree in computer science. train_1423.llm_answer: Consumer advocate: Ephedra is a naturally occurring compound that some people use as a weight-loss aid. train_594.llm_answer: Often patients with ankle fractures that are stable, and thus do not require surgery, are given follow-up x-rays because general practitioners, rather than orthopedists, are concerned about possibly having misjudged the stability of the fracture. When a number of follow-up x-rays were reviewed, however, all the fractures that had initially been judged stable by orthopedists were found to have healed correctly. Therefore, it is a waste of money to order follow-up x-rays of ankle fracture initially judged stable by orthopedists.
train_594.llm_explanation: This modification emphasizes the difference in judgment accuracy between general practitioners and orthopedists, allowing Premise 2 to strengthen the Argument while Premise 1 no longer does.

train_3979.llm_answer: More and more law firms specializing in corporate taxes are paid on an hourly rate basis. train_3979.llm_explanation: By changing the payment structure to hourly rates and making the case win less beneficial financially, Premise 2's assertion about taking on fewer cases suggests that firms in the contingency-fee model are more selective, which amplifies the argument that they expect higher rewards for successful cases. train_4104.llm_answer: Statement1: It is popularly believed that a poem has whatever meaning is assigned to it by the reader. Statement2: But objective evaluation of poetry is possible only if this popular belief is false ; for the aesthetic value of a poem can be discussed only if two readers arrive at the same interpretation of the poem.

train_1182.llm_answer: Critic: rock music is musically bankrupt and socially destructive, but at least the album covers of rock lps from the 1960s and 1970s often featured innovative visual art. train_2941.llm_answer: Statement1: Music critic: fewer and fewer musicians are studying classical music, decreasing the likelihood that those with real aptitude for such music will be performing it. train_939.llm_answer: Statement1: Twelve years ago and again five years ago, there were extended periods when the darfir republic's currency, the pundra, was weak: its value was unusually low relative to the world's most stable currencies. Both times a weak pundra made darfir's manufactured products a bargain on world markets, and darfir's exports were up substantially. Statement2: Now some politicians are saying that, in order to cause another similarly sized increase in exports, the government should allow the pundra to become weak again, despite the fact that a sharp improvement in the efficiency of darfir's manufacturing plants would make darfir's products a bargain on world markets even without any weakening of the pundra relative to other currencies.
train_939.llm_explanation: The modification to Statement 2 emphasizes that improvements in manufacturing efficiency could achieve the same export increase without needing a weak currency, thus weakening the argument for devaluing the pundra. Premise 1 remains neutral regarding the need for a weak currency, as it only states the current operational capacity of the manufacturing sector.

train_1248.llm_answer: Some experimental educational programs, based on the principle that children's first education should take place at home, instruct parents in how to be their child's first teacher. train_4022.llm_answer: Statement1: Super express shipping company has implemented a new distribution system that can get almost every package to its destination the day after it is sent. train_3914.llm_answer: Statement1: The miscarriage of justice in the barker case was due to the mistaken views held by some of the forensic scientists involved in the case, who believed that they owed allegiance only to the prosecuting lawyers. train_168.llm_answer: Statement1: If one wants to succeed, then one should act as though one were genuinely confident about one's abilities, even if one actually distrusts one's skills. train_2814.llm_answer: A company has developed a new sensing device that, according to the company's claims, detects electromagnetic signals that can pass through almost any physical obstruction. train_2710.llm_answer: Statement1: Virginia and her brother William disagree over when their father was born: Virginia claims it was in 1935 and William claims it was in 1933. train_3939.llm_answer: Human skin gives off an array of gaseous substances, including carbon dioxide and lactic acid, both of which attract mosquitoes. train_3551.llm_answer: Politician: a major social problem is children hurting other children.
